name: @rndrntwrk/plugin-555stream
description: Authenticate, configure, and operate 555 Stream sessions for go-live, channels, ads, overlays, chat, and guests.

steps: Set STREAM555_PUBLIC_BASE_URL and STREAM555_AGENT_API_KEY. Reserve STREAM555_INTERNAL_BASE_URL for allow-listed internal agents only.
Configure channels, then run STREAM555_STREAM_START or STREAM555_GO_LIVE_APP.
